provenance.source: Hand-authored negative control: prose stating the model would call a tool, conditional on missing info, without emitting a call.

raw_output: If you give me the date range, I would call search to pull the matching invoices. What range should I use?
note: The model names the tool in conditional prose and asks for missing information instead of calling. There is no call to recover; fabricating one would invent the query and range. no_tool is correct.
